subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath turned unto God and attained unto the lights of the Countenance when He appeared with the truth through mighty sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن توجه الی الله و فاز بانوار الوجه اذ ظهر بالحق بسلطان عظیم خرج من
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
